quotes: 70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances

original_text:
### Hierarchy & Application
- Apply the palette in the **primary > secondary > tertiary ratio** shown in the guide: blues and golds dominate; tertiary colors are accents and surfaces.
- **Headlines/headings:** Brand Blue (or White on dark/gradient backgrounds).
- **Body text:** Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds (with increased line height, §1.2).
- **Charts/about:blank** Brand Blue + Sky Blue dominant; **Sunshine/Gold strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures**; gray for placebo.
- **Callout surfaces:** Light Blue at 70% tint (data callouts); Golden Sand at 30% tint (text-heavy callouts).
- **Coral:** sparing tertiary accent only — never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. **[GENERAL]:** avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief calls for it.
- **Links [GENERAL]:** Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark.
- The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances** (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic).

relations.note: Chart-specific application of the primary>secondary>tertiary hierarchy.
Coral is a restricted tertiary accent within the palette hierarchy.

quotes: Apply the palette in the **primary > secondary > tertiary ratio** shown in the guide: blues and golds dominate; tertiary colors are accents and surfaces.

rules.intent: Preserve the intended visual hierarchy and dominance of core brand colors.
rules.rule_text: Apply the palette in the primary > secondary > tertiary ratio shown in the guide: blues and golds dominate; tertiary colors are used as accents and surfaces.

rules.intent: Ensure consistent, legible text coloring across background contexts.
rules.rule_text: Headlines/headings use Brand Blue (headline.color = #00529b), or White on dark/gradient backgrounds. Body text uses Graphite (body.color = #212121) on light backgrounds and White on dark backgrounds, with increased line height (§1.2).

rules.intent: Reserve accent gold for key-figure emphasis and keep chart data coloring consistent.
rules.rule_text: In charts, Brand Blue (#00529b) + Sky Blue (#358CCB) are dominant; Sunshine/Gold (#faa31b/#ffc60a) is strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures; gray is used for placebo.

rules.rule_text: Callout surfaces use Light Blue (#E6F0F9) at 70% tint for data callouts, and Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) at 30% tint for text-heavy callouts.
